note: Tier upgrades now paid in TestUSDC (new test_usdc module, 6 decimals). registry::upgrade takes Coin<TEST_USDC>; cost ladder 5/15/40/100 TUSDC for L0->1..L3->4. The coordinator holds the TreasuryCap and mints the exact cost inside the upgrade tx. Supersedes the SUI-upgrade package. Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) reused unchanged.

supersedes.reason: Upgrades were paid in SUI; replaced to charge TestUSDC per the tier economy.
